message:
feat(mvcc): add persistence layer with WAL support

Introduce persistence infrastructure for the MVCC layer, enabling
durable copy-on-write semantics with write-ahead logging.

New modules:
- persist.rs: On-disk format for committed pages and metadata
- wal.rs: Write-ahead log for crash recovery and transaction
  durability guarantees

Dependencies added:
- crc32fast for checksum validation

This lays the groundwork for supporting mutable filesystem operations
with full ACID guarantees via the MVCC architecture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -508,6 +508,7 @@ name = "ffs-core"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
+ "ffs-alloc",
  "ffs-block",
  "ffs-btrfs",
  "ffs-error",
@@ -626,11 +627,13 @@ name = "ffs-mvcc"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
+ "crc32c",
  "ffs-block",
  "ffs-error",
  "ffs-types",
  "parking_lot",
  "serde",
+ "tempfile",
  "thiserror",
 ]
